features: Recycle the bottle with the cap on
Healthy, protected underarm skin starts with the new Sanex BiomeProtect Dermo Moisturising Deodorant Roll On
This microbiome deodorant Roll On, made with natural moisturisers, has an advanced formula to fight odour causing bacteria and respect the good bacteria on skin without irritations
description: Product Description Sanex Biome Protect Hydrating Roll On 50ml Ingredients Aqua, PPG-15 Stearyl Ether, Steareth-2, Glycerin, Parfum, Steareth-21, Lactic Acid, Sodium Lactate, Caprylyl Glycol, Sodium Benzoate, Inulin, Calcium Silicate, Butyloctanol
